economics_outcome.note: Model lane uses qwen3.6:35b-a3b-bf16 (local Ollama). No paid supervisor tokens consumed beyond this P94 coordination run.

decision_rationale: P93 extraction produced a comprehensive 47-record seed covering all three cycle-three documents. Source hash coverage and chunk anchoring enable downstream retrieval. DP dedup flags are documented for P95 coordination. Proceed to P95 retrieval/usability testing.
next_phase_description: Retrieval and usability testing of the promoted index — verify that source hashes and chunk anchors support efficient record lookup and cross-document merge with P90/P91 results.
